items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Says Iran Downed U.S. Helicopter and Vows to Retaliate
items.summary: The president said Iranian forces had shot down a U.S. Apache helicopter over the Strait of Hormuz and the United States “must, of necessity, respond to this attack.”
